title: Terror Eel
move_pattern: Starts with Crash. Normal cycle alternates: Crash → Thrash → Crash → Thrash... The Stun and Terror moves are outside the normal cycle: Stun leads to Terror, which leads back to Crash.
notes: Spawns with 75 Shriek. The Stun and Terror moves are not part of the normal Crash/Thrash cycle and are not reachable from it — Stun (empty body) transitions to Terror (applies 99 Vulnerable to all targets), which then returns to Crash. These states are likely triggered externally when the monster is stunned by a player card.
